title: CareRequestConfiguration - Metadata API
description: Represents the details for a record type such as service request, drug request, or admission request. One or more record types can be associated with a care request.

careRequestRecordType.description: The record type for the care request.

careRequestRecords.description: The list of objects you can select to configure the care request.

careRequestType.description: The type of care request. For example, an appeal, a service request, or an admission.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the care request is active (true) or not (false).

careRequestRecord.description: The object selected to configure the care request.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="CareRequestConfiguration">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="careRequestRecordType" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="careRequestRecords" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:CareRequestRecords"/>
        <xsd:element name="careRequestType" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="isActive" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="isDefaultRecordType" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="CareRequestRecords">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="careRequestRecord" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
```

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: This is an example of a CareRequestConfiguration component.
